name: Pepper Steak Strips
recipeIngredient: 1 med Green Pepper, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the steak by cutting it into strips about 1/8-inch thick and 3-inches long.
2. In a skillet, brown the onions in butter until softened.
3. Add the steak to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
4. Stir in the brown boquet sauce, thyme leaves, red wine or water, and green pepper strips.
5. Cook for another 8-10 minutes until the steak is cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice.
